⛏ Welcome to Extraction
1
Idle Miner — Your miner auto-swings at rocks earning $EXT tokens 24/7. Upgrade Speed, Power and Sell to earn faster. Equip a pickaxe from your Backpack to boost earnings.
2
Dungeon — Spend $EXT to enter. Run 10 procedural floors, mine ore nodes for GC, fight enemies with E. 50% of your entry fee feeds the jackpot prize pool.
3
Excalibur Stone ⚔ — One golden stone is hidden per paid run. Find and mine it to roll a 25% jackpot pull. Win = a share of the pool that scales with your entry: 4–7.5% up to a 20K entry, climbing to ~40% at 100K. Hidden 5% chance to also receive the Mythic Prismatic Pickaxe — the game's rarest item.
4
Pickaxes — Loot pickaxes from dungeon chests or buy them on the Marketplace. Equip in Backpack to boost your idle miner and dungeon earnings.
5
Marketplace — Buy and sell pickaxes using your $EXT balance. Rarer pickaxes carry powerful affixes including the legendary Dungeon GC bonus.
6
Withdraw — Your $EXT balance is yours. Request a withdrawal anytime and it will be sent to your Solana wallet manually within 24 hours.

Extraction
on solana · player guide v0.3
Deposit from your Phantom wallet to top up your in-game $EXT, enter the dungeon, and hunt for the Excalibur Stone. Mine it and pull the 25% jackpot to win a share of the prize pool. Refine the ore you haul out into bonus GC, while your idle miner earns $EXT around the clock. Withdraw your balance back to your Solana wallet anytime.
The Loop
1
Deposit & Enter the Dungeon
Top up your in-game $EXT from your Phantom wallet (deposit $EXT 1:1 — what you send is what you get). Choose Free (no cost, limited runs) or a paid entry (1K–100K $EXT). Every paid entry splits 40% burn · 10% dev · 50% into the jackpot prize pool. Navigate 10 procedural floors, mine ore, fight enemies with E.
2
Explore Special Floors
Vein Floors glow with a "✦ VEIN FLOOR ✦" banner — every ore node gives 2× GC. Healing Shrines restore +60 HP when you press E nearby. Chests drop pickaxes.
3
Defeat Guardian Bosses
Floor 5 spawns the Guardian (600 HP) and Floor 10 the Inferno Guardian (1200 HP). Both fire 3-shot fireball volleys toward you with a ±fan spread. Stay mobile.
4
2× Loot on Floors 6–10
All GC mined on floors 6–10 is automatically doubled. Vein Floors stack on top of this for up to 4× GC.
5
Hunt the Excalibur Stone ⚔
One ⚔ Excalibur Stone is hidden per paid run — spawns per floor: 3% on floor 3, 4% on floor 4, 5% on floors 5+. Mine it and roll the 25% jackpot pull. Win and you receive a share of the pool that scales with your entry fee — 4–7.5% for entries up to 20K, scaling up to ~40% at a 100K entry. The rest stays in the pool and keeps building. ★ 5% secondary chance to also receive the ultra-rare Mythic Prismatic Pickaxe — the game's rarest item, unobtainable any other way.
6
Equip & Mine Idle
Equip your best pickaxe — and a companion if you've won one from the Shop's Pet Gatcha — in Backpack. Your miner auto-swings 24/7 against the crystal cave, earning $EXT. Rare rocks give up to 25× payout.
7
Reforge at the Blacksmith
Spend $EXT at the Blacksmith tab to re-roll a pickaxe's stats. Select a pickaxe from the grid, then hit Re-roll — you see Before vs After before committing. Costs scale with rarity.
8
Withdraw Your $EXT
Your in-game $EXT balance is real. Request a withdrawal from the Home screen and it will be sent to your connected Solana wallet within 24 hours. Minimum withdrawal: 50,000 $EXT. A 10% withdraw burn applies (request 50,000 → receive 45,000). Your balance carries over between sessions — never expires.
Dungeon Guide
Risky Mode has 1.5× more spikes & mobs and multiplies final GC by 1.5×. Fall = instant death. Double jump supported. Kill bonus: +8 GC (floors 1–5), +20 GC (floors 6–10).
✦ Vein Floor — 10% chance per floor. Glowing crystal banner announces it. All ore nodes on that floor give 2× GC. Stacks with 2× loot bonus on floors 6–10.
🩸 Healing Shrine — 10% chance per floor. A blood chalice glows on a platform. Press E nearby to restore +60 HP (capped at 100). One use per shrine.
⚔ Excalibur Stone — Spawn chance: 3% on floor 3, 4% on floor 4, 5% on floor 5+. Mine it to roll the 25% jackpot pull. Win = a share of the pool scaled by your entry fee: 4–7.5% up to 20K, up to ~40% at 100K — bigger entries win bigger jackpots. The rest stays and keeps building. ★ Hidden 5% chance: the jackpot also awards the ultra-rare Mythic Prismatic Pickaxe — the only way to obtain the Mythic tier.
🎵 Cave Music — Procedural dungeon music plays automatically. Toggle with the 🎵 button in the HUD. Sub-bass drones, chord pads, and ethereal highs create an immersive cave atmosphere.
❄ Falling Stalactites — From floor 4 onward, glassy spikes drop from the ceiling at random points across the cavern (a new one every 1–8s). They shatter on the ground, or deal 15 damage if one lands on you. Keep moving.
FloorNameEnemiesBossLoot
1Shallow MineSlimes—1×
2Deep ShaftSlimes, Bats—1×
3The CavernsBats, Spiders—1×
4The AbyssSpiders, Wraiths, Golems—1×
5The CoreAll types⚔ Guardian 600HP1×
6Abyss DeepArchers, Crushers—2×
7Shadow RealmArchers, Crushers, Wraiths—2×
8Crystal DepthsPhantoms, Crushers—2×
9Void RiftPhantoms, Archers—2×
10The InfernoAll Golems++👑 Inferno Guardian 1200HP2×

tank · winds up, then charges & slams you off ledges for 20

👑 Inferno Guardian 1200HP

Ore NodeGC ValueRefineVeinChance
Coal3 GC11–627%
Copper1 GC11–632%
Iron Ore1 GC21–624%
Silver Ore3 GC71–312%
Gold Ore10 GC101–24%
Mystrile25 GC181–21%
GC vs Refine: GC value scores the in-run leaderboard; Refine value ranks each ore's worth if you sell it on the marketplace. At run end you can instead trash your whole haul for bonus GC (see Ore Refinery below). Rare ore drops less often and in smaller veins, but sells for far more.
Idle Miner
Your miner auto-swings at rocks 24/7 in the crystal cave earning $EXT passively. Rare rocks give multiplied $EXT payouts. The Leaderboard (top-right) tracks total rocks mined. Equip a pickaxe from your Backpack to boost speed and earnings — better pickaxes mean more $EXT per hour.
Rock$EXT MultiBase ChanceMax Luck
Standard1×Always—
Silver3×10%20%
Gold5×1%2%
Mystrile25×0.1%0.2%
UpgradeEffect / Level
⚡ Speed+0.015 swings/sec
💥 Power+0.12 dmg/swing
💎 Sell+0.00026 $EXT/rock
🍀 LuckRare-rock chance +0.1% / +0.01% / +0.001% (Silver / Gold / Mystrile)
Cost: Levels 1–49 use a cheap GC-only ramp. From level 50 the real economy begins — every upgrade costs GC (90 at L50, ×1.075 per level) plus a recipe of several ores that shifts toward rarer ore as you climb:
LevelsOres required
50–69Coal + Iron + Silver
70–79Iron + Silver + Gold
80–99Iron + Silver + Gold + Mystrile
100–129Silver + Gold + Mystrile
130+Gold + Mystrile
Tip: Upgrade Speed → Power → Sell → Luck. Speed × Power = DPS. Sell turns DPS into $EXT. Luck multiplies payouts from rare rocks.
Heads up: You must have every ore in the recipe to upgrade — the button shows each ore's icon and your have / need, turning red for any you're short on. You need more of the common ore and less of the rare (about Coal ×1 · Iron ×0.6 · Silver ×0.4 · Gold ×0.25 · Mystrile ×0.12 of the base amount). Both GC and ore costs rise ~7.5% per level.
Companions
Companions ride along with your idle miner and grant passive bonuses. You can own several, but only one is equipped at a time — equip from the Backpack or the Marketplace → Companions tab. They're won from the Pet Gatcha in the Shop.
CompanionBonuses
Sanchez+10% Miner Output · +10% Dungeon Ore
Fox+20% Mining Speed · +15% Luck
Trollawhalo+30% Mining Power · +10% Sell Price
Gnomeo+35% Luck · +15% Mining Speed
Pet Gatcha (Shop)
Spin the wheel in the Shop tab for a chance at a companion. Your first spin is free; every spin after costs $1 USDC from your Phantom wallet. No daily limit — spin as often as you like. Every spin is guaranteed a prize: land a pet, or win ore added straight to your stash.
PrizeOdds
Gnomeo1.00%  (1 in 100)
Fox0.50%  (1 in 200)
Trollawhalo0.33%  (1 in 300)
Sanchez0.25%  (1 in 400)
Ore bundleremaining ~97.9%
Ore drops: Coal / Copper / Iron ×10–20 · Silver / Gold ×5–10 · Mystrile ×1–3, weighted toward the common ores. Rolls, payment, and the once-free spin are all enforced server-side; live odds are shown in the Shop.
Pickaxes & Item Stats
Starter Gear: Every new player begins with a free Iron (Common) Pickaxe equipped — +1% mining speed. Equip it in the Backpack tab to activate the bonus.
RarityDrop%StatsAffix Range
Iron (Common)50%1+1–5%
Adamant (Uncommon)30%1–2+2–8%
Crystal (Rare)15%2–3+4–12%
Pyrite (Epic)4%3–4+8–18%
Ancient (Legendary)1%5+12–25%
Prismatic (Mythic)Jackpot only5+20–40%
⚡ Mining Speed
Boosts idle miner swings/sec and dungeon mining rate
💥 Mining Power
Increases damage per swing — break rocks faster
💎 Sell Price
Boosts your idle miner's $EXT earnings
🍀 Luck
Higher chance to encounter Silver, Gold and Mystrile rocks
✨ Dungeon GC +10%
Legendary only. Fixed +10% GC from all dungeon ore nodes
Blacksmith
The Blacksmith tab (⚒ Smith) lets you re-roll a pickaxe's stats using $EXT. Select any pickaxe from the market-style grid, then press Re-roll to see new stats in the Before / After forge panel. Costs scale with rarity.
RarityRe-roll Cost
Common1,000 $EXT
Uncommon5,000 $EXT
Rare10,000 $EXT
Epic25,000 $EXT
Legendary50,000 $EXT
Mythic200,000 $EXT
Tip: Legendary pickaxes can roll the exclusive Dungeon GC +10% stat — keep re-rolling until you land it for maximum dungeon earnings. Mythic Prismatic Pickaxes also roll a unique Crystal Resonance +25% bonus exclusive to the Mythic tier.
Controls
← → / A D
Move left / right
↑ / W / Space
↑ / W to jump (double-jump supported) · Space = a big jump on a 3s cooldown
↓ / S
Drop through thin platforms
E
Mine ore · attack enemies · interact with shrines & chests
🖱 Left Click
Mine ore block · attack enemies
🎵 Button
Toggle cave dungeon music on/off
Ore Refinery
At the end of any paid run (free runs don't qualify), trash the ore you hauled out for bonus GC. Or keep it to sell on the marketplace for USDC instead — rare ore is worth far more sold than trashed.
Payout: trashing your haul awards +1.5× the GC you mined that run. Mine 100 GC → trash for +150 → 250 total. This keeps trash rewarding without depending on which ore types you pulled.
Death tax: If you choose to descend deeper and then die, you lose 30% of that run's GC and 30% of its ore haul before refining. Cash out safe, or push your luck for a bigger haul.
Deposit & Withdraw
Deposit: Tap Deposit in the top bar — your connected Phantom wallet signs the transfer and your in-game $EXT is credited instantly. Deposits are in $EXT, credited 1:1 — send 10,000 $EXT, get 10,000 in-game.
Withdraw: Request a withdrawal from Settings — your $EXT is sent to your connected Solana wallet within 24 hours. Minimum withdrawal: 50,000 $EXT. A 10% withdraw burn applies (request 50,000 → receive 45,000). Your balance carries between sessions and never expires.
$EXT & Economy
Entry Fee Slider: Set your $EXT entry (1K–100K) on a log scale. Higher entry = better loot multiplier (up to 20×) + higher Excalibur Stone spawn odds. Every paid entry splits 40% burned · 10% to dev · 50% into the prize pool.
Loot Tiers: LOW (1K–3K $EXT) · MEDIUM (3K–10K) · HIGH (10K–50K) · MAX (50K–100K). The label shows on the dungeon entry screen.
Prize Pool: Displayed live on the Home screen (and in the jackpot jar on the Idle Miner). Grows with every paid dungeon entry — 50% of each fee. On a jackpot win (25% chance) the winner takes a fee-scaled share — 4–7.5% of the pool for entries up to 20K, up to ~40% at 100K. The rest stays in the pool and keeps building.
Save System: All progress (GC, $EXT, ore, upgrades, inventory) saves automatically — cloud-synced to your X (Twitter) account when signed in, so it follows you across devices. Settings → Reset wipes your local save.
Player Marketplace
Trade items and ore directly with other players. Buyers pay in USDC straight to the seller's Phantom wallet on-chain — there's no escrow, the transaction itself is the settlement. List your best pickaxes and loot, or dump surplus ore for real value.
DetailValue
SettlementUSDC on Solana, seller wallet direct (no escrow)
Marketplace fee5% — taken out of the seller's cut
Buyer paysExactly the sticker price
Seller nets95% of the listing price
Max active item listings6 per seller
Minimum price$0.01 USDC
Tradable oreCoal · Copper · Iron · Silver · Gold · Mystrile
On a sale the payment is verified three ways on-chain — seller's cut, the 5% fee, and the total — so neither side can be shorted. Each payment signature can only ever claim one item.
Double-buy protection: Listings are claimed atomically — if two people buy at the exact same moment, one wins and the other's payment is flagged for a manual refund. If that's you, keep your TX signature and contact support.
Daily Login Streak
Hit the Claim button once every 24 hours for a growing $EXT reward. Miss more than 48 hours and the streak resets to Day 1. The cycle runs 7 days, then loops back around.
DayRewardDayReward
Day 1500 $EXTDay 52,000 $EXT
Day 2750 $EXTDay 63,000 $EXT
Day 31,000 $EXTDay 75,000 $EXT
Day 41,500 $EXT—then loops
Note: The claim cooldown is a rolling 24 hours enforced server-side. The login screen shows your current streak, but the reward only lands when you actually tap Claim.
Fair Play & Anti-Cheat
Automated checks protect the leaderboard and the economy so real players aren't drowned out by exploiters.
God-mode detection: Runs that look impossible — deep floors cleared repeatedly with zero damage taken — raise a flag. Enough flags and the account is auto-suspended.
Suspended accounts are hidden from the leaderboard and blocked from deposits, withdrawals, and the marketplace.
Rate limits & caps are in place throughout to prevent GC inflation and abuse. The leaderboard ranks the top 50 by lifetime GC extracted.
